merchant_info.name: PT Tiga Pilar Media

merchant_info.address: Kinanti Building, 2nd floor, Jln. Epicentrum Tengah No. 3, Karet Kuningan, Setia Budi, Jakarta Selatan 12940

parameter_a.notes: PT name stated, address & contact provided. Website appears dated (copyright 2019)

parameter_b.notes: OOH advertising is not a BI/OJK regulated activity. No regulatory gate override applicable.

parameter_c.notes: Clear service offerings: Billboard, Building, Public Area, Vehicle, Airport advertising. Business model (B2B advertising) well explained.

parameter_d.notes: No pricing/fees displayed, no billing structure, no refund policy, no dispute resolution process, no SLA

parameter_e.notes: Generic boilerplate T&C (mentions 'prevailing law of Netherlands' - odd for Indonesian company). Missing: specific fees, cancellation terms, refund policy, dispute resolution.

parameter_f.notes: Contact form available, phone and email provided. No documented escalation path, no SLA.

parameter_g.notes: Last updated November 9, 2019 (outdated). Does not comply with UU PDP 27/2022. Missing: data subject rights, retention periods, lawful basis, DPO contact.

parameter_h.notes: HTTPS enabled. No visible customer portal/login. Website appears dated.

parameter_i.notes: Social media presence (LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram). Portfolio page shows past projects. Limited independent reviews (B2B advertising).

general_notes: Expected score based on v2.1: 73/100, PROCEED WITH CONDITIONS
